rulings.Case Title: SHELLEY WIENKE, INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF THE VS. CHASE HOME FINANCE, LLC., A DELAWARE LIMITED et al

rulings.Case Title: ANNA CHEUNG VS. WMC MORTGAGE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2012, line 11. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEWOLF REALTY CO.,INC et al VS. JEFFREY NEEDELMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT JEFFREY NEEDELMAN's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Continued to July 3, 2012. Moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6(B) and provide courtesy copy of moving papers and reply to Dept. 501 by 4PM on JUN-26-2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION ITS VS. JUANA INES TELLO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFF FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Hearing required to show Proof of Service and address current possession by named defendants. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUEY QUON SIU et al VS. MAUREEN MCCLENDON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2012, line 9. DEFENDANT MAUREEN MCCLENDON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANUJ AGARWAL VS. JAMES L. MCGHEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Admissions To Be Deemed Admitted; Compel Further Production; Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2012, line 10. DEFENDANTs JAMES MCGHE and BELLE TAYLOR-MCGHEE's Motion for Monetary Sanctions and continuance of trial date. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GLORIA DELAO VS. HERMILA ALVAREZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANTs HERMILA ALVARE and LIZANDRO ALVAREZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend if can allege second cause of action in good faith; 1) 60 day notice fails to set forth basis for termination pursuant to San Francisco Rent Ordinance and is fatally defective. 2) Complaint fails to allege complaince with San Francisco Rent Ordinance 37.9B(c). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. CHAI FAI LEUNG AKA VINCENT LEUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANTs VINCENT LEUNG and STEVEN LEUNG's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend. Notice fatally defective, only one baisis for eviction and notice has conflicting provisions 1) to quit only and 2) to cure or quit. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRIANA HEWITT VS. JONATHAN WILKINS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT JONATHAN WILKINS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain demurrer and stayed pending resolution of case CGC-12-518050 (no opposition filed). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRIANA HEWITT VS. JONATHAN WILKINS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT JONATHAN WILKINS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Deny, untimely per CCP 1167.4, filed May-21-2012 noticed JUN-25-2012 (no opposition filed.) = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. BERNETTA ADOLPH et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT BERNETTA ADOLPH's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SOJOURN PROPERTIES VS. JOSEPHINE MCAFFERRY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANT BRENT JOHNSON's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Deny, failed to sustain burden. = (501/REQ)
